data.body: Partially delivered as part of the 744b editor round-trip: layered layout (no overlap), edge waypoints, expanded sub-processes, working properties panel (kind/action/prompt-text/condition/config), connection labels (true/false/default/after), start/end events. REMAINING UX + architecture (prompt library/dropdown, MCP steps, input/output contracts, single-turn vs agentic, editable prompts, in-editor JSON validation/help) will be folded into the upcoming workflow-editing remediation epic (to be designed via /joe-brainstorm). Keeping OPEN until re-parented there.
